params.TgtPrompt: Select target activated or triggered ability you control from an artifact source
params.SpellDescription: Copy target activated or triggered ability you control from an artifact source. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Mana abilities can't be targeted.)

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Copy target activated or triggered ability you control from an artifact source. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Mana abilities can't be targeted.)
